name: SCC_CM_Atten_Char_Rsp
title: SCC_CM_Atten_Char_Rsp
syntax: void SCC_CM_Atten_Char_Rsp ( byte RunId[], byte SourceMacAddress[], byte SourceAddress[] )
description: The callback is called as soon as a CM_Atten_Char.Rsp message is received.

parameters.name: RunId
parameters.description: Random Run Identifier of sender (8 byte)
